items.name: Chaaya
items.description: Kerala-style milk tea. Strong, consistent, served from a samovar.

items.name: Kattan
items.description: Black tea, no milk. Same samovar decoction, diluted with hot water.

items.name: Lime
items.description: Fresh lime with water or soda. The cold option.

items.name: Rusk
items.description: Kerala bakery rusk. Served with chaaya - the dip is the point.

items.name: Le Noodles
items.description: Spiced instant noodles, prepped to a fixed spec.

items.name: Le Chilli Butter Rice
items.description: Hot steamed rice, a pat of butter, a drizzle of soy and chilli oil. Comfort in a bowl, ready in minutes.

items.name: Pazhampori
items.description: The Kerala classic. Banana fritters, fried golden.

items.name: Le Nutella Cheese Toast
items.description: Toasted bread, a layer of Nutella, a slice of melted cheese on top. Sweet, salty, indulgent.
